author: Ameen Hassan
summary: The user asked whether their MCP server was connected. Claude checked the available deferred tools and MCP server status visible in the session context and confirmed that multiple MCP servers were connected, including at minimum a computer-use server for desktop control. The session was very brief with no substantive task work performed.
problems: User was uncertain whether their MCP server(s) were connected
approaches: Inspected deferred tools list in session context to identify connected MCP servers
results: Confirmed multiple MCP servers are connected, including computer-use (desktop control/screenshots)
open_questions: Whether all expected MCP servers are connected and functioning correctly beyond the ones listed
